name: Metadata Extraction
description: Analyzes Claude Code conversation history to identify patterns, common mistakes, and opportunities for workflow improvement. Extracts and processes metadata from conversation data.

findings_summary.notes: Repository confirmed active and public (406 stars, Apache-2.0). Subdirectory path in stored record (computer-forensics-skills) does not exist in the repo; the actual conversation-analyzer skill lives under productivity-skills-plugin/skills/conversation-analyzer. SKILL.md present. Python analysis script (analyze_history.py) included. Parent repo is well-maintained with 47 forks and active issues. Minor concern: subdirectory path mismatch in original record. No malicious code detected.
